title: CommitDiffSourceCodeType
description: A type of SourceCodeType that specifies the commit diff for a pull request on an associated repository. The SourceCommit and DestinationCommit fields are required to do a pull request code review.

allOf.description: The SHA of the source commit used to generate a commit diff. This field is required for a pull request code review.
The SHA of the destination commit used to generate a commit diff. This field is required for a pull request code review.
The SHA of the merge base of a commit.
